绕过网站搜索，书源调动夸克接口；
若搜索功能仍不能用（APP不支持），请启用【网址添加】功能。
优化列表：bookurlpattern规则精确过滤网站结果；bookurl规则通过用JavaScript精确提取小说详情页链接，；name规则通过JavaScript正则清洗夸克返回的页面标题，去除无关推广文案，还原纯书名；rulesearch字段定义booklist，bookurl，intro，name，author；header定义user-agent和语言模仿移动端浏览器，rulebookinfo使用<meta>标签中的OG信息；rulecontent的nextcontenturl支持抓取章节分页，配置相应分类页面规则且可在搜索失效时通过遍历页建立本地索引

bookSourceComment:
本书源为群友【joestar】特别制作。此版本修复了抓取功能不完整的问题。
搜索功能因yandex反爬太强不能用。
先去yandex浏览器或者引擎搜索【（书籍名）+小原文学网】，点进结果在搜索框获取书籍链接，再回阅读使用网址添加功能使用。
yandex引擎部分国内浏览器如“狐猴浏览器”自带，且可以通过国内浏览器搜索yandex官网直接使用。
另，可在爬取内容后通过分类遍历页建立本地索引，
以上。

ruleExplore.author: $.author
ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>

let ck = "sessionid=" + (String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) ? String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) : (source.getLoginInfoMap() || {})['手动登录Token'])

getShelf = () => {
let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'
let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
  headers: {
    'Cookie': ck
  }
}))

bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
let id_list = splitArray(bid, 100)
let urls = []
id_list.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(xGorgon("multi-detail", "book_id=" + i.join(","), null, ck))
})

res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

let resp = {book_info: []}
res.forEach(r => {
  resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
})

return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
  let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'

  let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
    headers: {
      'Cookie': ck,
    }
  })))
  let group_bookids = {
    "未分组": []
  }
  // java.log(
  book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
    if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
    group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id)
  })
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(group_bookids["未分组"]))
  // java.log(decodeURIComponent(name))
  if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
  //java.log("awa")
  let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 100)
  let urls = []

  book_ids.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(xGorgon("multi-detail", "book_id=" + i.join(","), null, ck))
  })
  
  res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

  let resp = {book_info: []}
  res.forEach(r => {
    resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
  })

  return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
  let url = xGorgon(
	  "bookmall/tab",
    "version_name=5.8.9.32&device_id=1024&device_type=114514&iid=2048",
	  null,
	  ck
  )
  let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
  let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index]
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(tab))
  tab = tab.cell_data
  if (!tab) tab = []
  let bookList = []
  for (let i of tab) {
    bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    // java.log(JSON.stringify(i.book_data))
  }
  return { book_info: bookList }
}

if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
else {
  let w = baseUrl.split("/")
  if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
    result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
  } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
    result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
  } else result = JSON.parse(result)
}
JSON.stringify({data: result.book_info || result.data.book_info || result.detail_list || result.data})
</js>
$.data[*]

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
let res = JSON.parse(result)
if (res.url) {
  res = JSON.parse(java.ajax(res.url))
}
let books

if (res.search_tabs) {
  res.search_tabs.forEach((i) => {
    if (i.tab_type == 3) books = i.data
  })
} else books = res.data

let results = []

let a = Array.isArray(books) ? books : [books]
a.forEach(w => {
  results.push((w.book_data || [])[0] || [w][0])
})

JSON.stringify(results)
</js>$[*]

gender=baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)[1]:""
category_id=baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_filters=baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)[1]:""
page=baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_category=baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)[1]:""
tag_id=baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'
headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
headers['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))


var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {
  if(param==null) return '';
  var paramStr = '';
  var t = typeof (param);
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
  } else {
    for (var i in param) {
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);
    }
  }
  return paramStr;
};

var category = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'category_id':category_id,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'need_category':need_category}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/category/get-list?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};

var tag = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'tag_id':tag_id}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/tag/index?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};


if(baseUrl.match(/category/)){
  category()
}else {
  tag()
}
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
let tp = (baseUrl.match(/genre_type=(\d)/) || [, '0'])[1];
source.put('tp',tp)
function getBookIdFull(url) {
	const {java} = this
	$ = JSON.parse(url).data
	if ($.book_shelf_info != 0 && $.book_shelf_info != undefined) {
		arr = $.book_shelf_info.map($ => $.book_id)
	} else if (list = $.data_list != 0 && $.data_list != undefined)  {
		arr = $.data_list.map($ => $.book_id_str)
	} else {
		java.toast("获取 book_id 失败，你可能需要登录！")
	}
	return arr
}
let ck = "sessionid=" + (String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) ? String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) : (source.getLoginInfoMap() ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {})['手动登录Token'])

getShelf = () => {
let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'
let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
  headers: {
    'Cookie': ck
  }
}))

let arrB = []
for (let i of JSON.parse(book_shelf_info).data.book_shelf_info) {
  arrB.push(i.book_id)
}
write_config('bookshelf.' + read_config('userinfo.userid'), arrB)

bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
let id_list = splitArray(bid, 100)
let urls = []
id_list.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(source.key + "/multi-detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
})

res = java.ajaxAll(urls)
let resp = {book_info: []}
res.forEach(r => {
  resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
})

return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
  let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'

  let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
    headers: {
      'Cookie': ck,
    }
  })))
  let group_bookids = {
    "组外": []
  }
  book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
    if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "组外"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
    group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "组外"].push(i.book_id)
  })
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(group_bookids["组外"]))
  // java.log(decodeURIComponent(name))
  if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
  //java.log("awa")
  let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 100)
  let urls = []

  book_ids.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(source.key + "/multi-detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
  })
  
  res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

  let resp = {book_info: []}
  res.forEach(r => {
    resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
  })

  return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
  let url = _mlsec.requestHeader(
	  "bookmall/tab",
    "version_name=5.8.9.32",
	  null,
	  ck
  )
  let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
  let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index].cell_data
  if (!tab) tab = []
  let bookList = []
  for (let i of tab) {
    bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    // java.log(JSON.stringify(i.book_data))
  }
  return { book_info: bookList }
}

if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
else {
  let w = baseUrl.split("/")
  if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
    result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
  } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
    result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
  } else result = JSON.parse(result)
}


JSON.stringify({
  data: result.book_list || result.book_info || result.data.result ||
        result.data.book_info || result.detail_list || result.data
});

</js>

  function succes(){
		yzm=java.getVerificationCode(code);
		url+=","+getOption(yzm,"");
		hm=java.ajax(url);
		co=java.getCookie(url,"g3jy9sqo0ws");
   source.setVariable(yzm+',g3jy9sqo0ws='+co)
   return hm;
  }
	if(yzco&&yzco!=''){
		v=String(yzco).split(',');
		u=url+","+getOption(v[0],v[1]);
		result=java.ajax(u);
		if(/请输入验证码/.test(result)){
			java.longToast("  ！验证码过期或有误，重新获取  ！")
			result=succes();
		}
	}else{result=succes("");}
result
}catch(err){java.log(err);result}
</js>
.B

ruleToc.chapterName:
$.chapter_name@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*[\)\}）｝】]/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

🅿️ Pixiv 小说（更新📆：2026/03/20）

书源版本：264
使用说明：📌阅读 Plus 3.26.0129 版本可用
可用功能：✅搜索✅发现✅添加网址✅订阅源
搜索小说：✅单篇✅系列✅标签✅作者
发现小说：✅关注✅追更✅推荐✅发现
发现小说：✅收藏✅书签✅首页✅排行
添加网址：✅小说✅系列✅作者
订阅用法：点击订阅源打开小说/系列小说，【刷新】，点击【加入书架】按钮，添加到书架

书源发布：Pixiv 书源频道 https://t.me/PixivSource
项目地址：https://github.com/DowneyRem/PixivSource
使用教程：https://pixivsource.pages.dev/Pixiv

⚙️ 书源设置：
1️⃣ 书架 - 阅读界面 - Pixiv 小说 - 登录
2️⃣ 我的 - 书源管理 - Pixiv 小说 - 登录
点击【👀 书源设置】【👀 发现设置】显示相关设置按钮

▶️ 互动功能、自定义功能：
1️⃣ 小说书架 - 阅读界面 - Pixiv 小说 - 登录

💬 发送评论：
1️⃣ 文本框内 输入内容，点击【✅ 发送评论】

🚫 屏蔽标签/描述(本地)：
1️⃣ 点击【👀 查看屏蔽】，切换至屏蔽列表
2️⃣ 文本框内 输入内容，点击【🚫 加入屏蔽】

📌 喜欢标签(本地)：
1️⃣ 文本框内 输入标签，点击【📌 喜欢标签】

❤️ 关注 他人收藏(本地)：
1️⃣ 文本框内 输入作者ID，点击【❤️ 他人收藏】
header: {"Referer":"https://www.pixiv.net"}

书籍来源于：https://twkan.com
正常情况本书源无需代理，无需过验证，可直接使用，部分地区用户可能无法访问，需要开代理
欢迎使用晴天融合书源，融合书源支持番茄小说，七猫小说，喜马拉雅听书，懒人听书，番茄短剧，河马短剧，69书吧等几十中来源，地址：http://vip.gyks.cf

exploreUrl:
<js>
const data = [
    "玄幻奇幻",
    "武侠仙侠",
    "现代都市",
    "历史军事",
    "游戏竞技",
    "科幻小说",
    "恐怖灵异",
    "言情小说",
    "动漫同人",
    "其他类型"
];

let categorys = [];
const status = ["连载", "全本"];

for (let i of status) {
    categorys.push({
        title: i,
        url: `/ranking?status=${i}&page={{page}}`,
        style: {
            layout_flexGrow: 1,
            layout_flexBasisPercent: 1
        }
    });
    
    for (let j of data) {
        categorys.push({
            title: j,
            url: `/ranking?category=${j}&status=${i}&page={{page}}`,
            style: {
                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25
            }
        });
    }
}

categorys.push({
    title: "最新",
    url: "/ranking?new=1&page={{page}}",
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 1
    }
});

for (let j of data) {
    categorys.push({
        title: j,
        url: `/ranking?category=${j}&new=1&page={{page}}`,
        style: {
            layout_flexGrow: 1,
            layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25
        }
    });
}

categorys.push({
    title: "字数",
    url: "/ranking?wordNumber=1&page={{page}}",
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 1
    }
});

for (let j of data) {
    categorys.push({
        title: j,
        url: `/ranking?category=${j}&wordNumber=1&page={{page}}`,
        style: {
            layout_flexGrow: 1,
            layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25
        }
    });
}

JSON.stringify(categorys);
</js>

<js>
//用于自动生成发现规则
b=false;
if(b){
let api="/app/lib/listv2?packageId=ihuaben&page=\{\{page\}\}&pageSize=20&sortType=clickcount_days_7&tagId=0&tokenId=NTAyNDUwNTA6MTYyNjcyMzYyMzpjMGU3ODlhNzQ3OTZmYmIy&keyword=";
let words=['都市言情','古代言情','玄幻言情','校园言情','穿越言情','灵异言情','短篇','二次元','灵异','都市','玄幻奇幻','历史军事','武侠仙侠','游戏竞技','科幻末世','明星同人','动漫同人','游戏同人','影视同人','小说同人'];
var s=[];
words.map(o=>{
var i={"title":o,"url":api+o}
s.push(i);
})
java.log(JSON.stringify(s))
}
java.getString("$.wordcount")
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
function getBookIdFull(url) {
	const {java} = this
	$ = JSON.parse(url).data
	if ($.book_shelf_info != 0 && $.book_shelf_info != undefined) {
		arr = $.book_shelf_info.map($ => $.book_id)
	} else if (list = $.data_list != 0 && $.data_list != undefined)  {
		arr = $.data_list.map($ => $.book_id_str)
	} else {
		java.toast("获取 book_id 失败，你可能需要登录！")
	}
	return arr
}
let ck = "sessionid=" + (String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) ? String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) : (source.getLoginInfoMap() ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {})['手动登录Token'])

getShelf = () => {
let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'
let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
  headers: {
    'Cookie': ck
  }
}))

let arrB = []
for (let i of JSON.parse(book_shelf_info).data.book_shelf_info) {
  arrB.push(i.book_id)
}
write_config('bookshelf.' + read_config('userinfo.userid'), arrB)

bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
let id_list = splitArray(bid, 100)
let urls = []
id_list.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(source.key + "/multi-detail?bookid=" + i.join(","))
})

res = java.ajaxAll(urls)
let resp = {book_info: []}
res.forEach(r => {
  resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
})

return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
  let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'

  let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
    headers: {
      'Cookie': ck,
    }
  })))
  let group_bookids = {
    "组外": []
  }
  book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
    if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "组外"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
    group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "组外"].push(i.book_id)
  })
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(group_bookids["组外"]))
  // java.log(decodeURIComponent(name))
  if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
  //java.log("awa")
  let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 100)
  let urls = []

  book_ids.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(source.key + "/multi-detail?bookid=" + i.join(","))
  })
  
  res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

  let resp = {book_info: []}
  res.forEach(r => {
    resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
  })

  return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
  let url = _mlsec.requestHeader(
	  "bookmall/tab",
    "version_name=5.8.9.32",
	  null,
	  ck
  )
  let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
  let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index].cell_data
  if (!tab) tab = []
  let bookList = []
  for (let i of tab) {
    bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    // java.log(JSON.stringify(i.book_data))
  }
  return { book_info: bookList }
}

if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
else {
  let w = baseUrl.split("/")
  if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
    result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
  } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
    result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
  } else result = JSON.parse(result)
}
JSON.stringify({data: result.book_list || result.book_info || result.data.result || result.data.book_info || result.detail_list || result.data })
</js>
$..book_data[*]||$.data[*]
ruleExplore.coverUrl:
<js>
let replaceCover = (u) => {
    if (u.startsWith("https://")) u = u.substring(8)
    else u = u.substring(7)
    let uArr = u.split("/")
    uArr[0] = "https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin"
    let uArr2 = []
    uArr.forEach((x) => {
        if (!x.includes("?") && !x.includes("~")) uArr2.push(x)
        else uArr2.push(x.split("~")[0])
    })
    u = uArr2.join("/")
    return u
}
replaceCover(java.getString("thumb_url"))
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
gender=baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)[1]:""
category_id=baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_filters=baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)[1]:""
page=baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_category=baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)[1]:""
tag_id=baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'
headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
headers['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))


var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {
  if(param==null) return '';
  var paramStr = '';
  var t = typeof (param);
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
  } else {
    for (var i in param) {
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);
    }
  }
  return paramStr;
};

var category = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'category_id':category_id,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'need_category':need_category}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/category/get-list?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};

var tag = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'tag_id':tag_id}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/tag/index?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};


if(baseUrl.match(/category/)){
  category()
}else {
  tag()
}
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
gender=baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)[1]:""
category_id=baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_filters=baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)[1]:""
page=baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_category=baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)[1]:""
tag_id=baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'
headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
headers['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))


var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {
  if(param==null) return '';
  var paramStr = '';
  var t = typeof (param);
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
  } else {
    for (var i in param) {
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);
    }
  }
  return paramStr;
};

var category = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'category_id':category_id,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'need_category':need_category}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/category/get-list?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};

var tag = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'tag_id':tag_id}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/tag/index?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};


if(baseUrl.match(/category/)){
  category()
}else {
  tag()
}
</js>

<js>
jms=JSON.parse(result);
jm=String(jms.body.content).split("a2o@");
function formatSeconds(value) { 
var theTime = parseInt(value);// 秒 
var theTime1 = 0;// 分 
var theTime2 = 0;// 小时 
if(theTime > 60) { 
theTime1 = parseInt(theTime/60); 
theTime = parseInt(theTime%60); 
if(theTime1 > 60) { 
theTime2 = parseInt(theTime1/60); 
theTime1 = parseInt(theTime1%60); } } 
var result = ""+parseInt(theTime)+"秒"; 
if(theTime1 > 0) { 
result = ""+parseInt(theTime1)+"分"+result; } 
if(theTime2 > 0) { 
result = ""+parseInt(theTime2)+"小时"+result; } 
return result; } 
if(jm.length>1){
key="S3VqaWFuZ0FwcDc0NzYwNQ==";
iv=jm[0];
data=jm[1];
var javaImport = new JavaImporter();
javaImport.importPackage(
    Packages.java.lang,
    Packages.java.io,
    Packages.java.util,
    Packages.java.util.zip
);
with(javaImport) {
    function decode(content) {
        decode = Base64.getDecoder().decode(String(content));
             byteArrayOutputStream = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
             byteArrayInputStream = new ByteArrayInputStream(decode);
            gZIPInputStream = new GZIPInputStream(byteArrayInputStream);
            bArr = String(" ").getBytes(); 
            while (true) {
                read = gZIPInputStream.read(bArr);
                if (read > 0) {
                    byteArrayOutputStream.write(bArr, 0, read);
                } else {
                    gZIPInputStream.close();
                    byteArrayInputStream.close();
                    byteArrayOutputStream.close();
                    return byteArrayOutputStream.toString();
                }
          }
    }
}

decode(java.aesBase64DecodeToString(data,java.base64Decode(key),"AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding",java.base64Decode(iv)))}
else{"新章节需要解封\n"+"解锁时间还需："+formatSeconds(String(jms.body.left_seconds))}
</js>

<js>
//从豆瓣获取封面
var pic="";
let j=JSON.parse(java.ajax("https://book.douban.com/j/subject_suggest?q="+book.name));
j.map(o=>{
if(o.title==book.name){pic=o.pic}
});
if(pic.length<3&&j.length>0){
pic=j[0].pic;
}
result=pic
//java.log(result)
</js>

})

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
gender=baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)[1]:""
category_id=baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_filters=baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)[1]:""
page=baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_category=baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)[1]:""
tag_id=baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'
headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
headers['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))


var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {
  if(param==null) return '';
  var paramStr = '';
  var t = typeof (param);
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
  } else {
    for (var i in param) {
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);
    }
  }
  return paramStr;
};

var category = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'category_id':category_id,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'need_category':need_category}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/category/get-list?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};

var tag = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'tag_id':tag_id}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/tag/index?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};


if(baseUrl.match(/category/)){
  category()
}else {
  tag()
}
</js>

bookSourceComment:
测试ai，我历劫了。

2026-03-16 by 天天的鸟蛋蛋（蛋蛋）by 书源驯兽师 AI（虾捣蛋）完成

知识点:
- 基于真实 HTML 源码分析
- 目录链接：.list a@href (详情页获取目录页链接)
- 目录列表：#list li (id 选择器)
- 正文规则：.con@html (class 选择器)
- 作者规则：p a[href*='/zuozhe/']@text
- 封面规则：img.0@src (第一个图片)
- 使用数字索引替代伪类选择器

真实结构验证:
- 搜索页：/i/sor.aspx?key={{key}}
- 搜索结果：.item
- 书名：.itemtxt h3 a@text
- 作者：.itemtxt p a@text
- 分类：.itemtxt p span.1@text
- 最新章节：.itemtxt ul li.0 a@text
- 封面：.item img@src
- 书籍链接：.item a.0@href
- 详情页：h1 书名，p a[href*='/zuozhe/'] 作者，img.0 封面，.list a@href 目录链接
- 目录：#list li → a@text, a@href，text.下一页@href 分页
- 正文：.con@html，text.下一页@href 下一章

版本信息:
- 技能包版本：v21.0 回退 v17 目录链接版
- 创建时间：2026-03-16
- 状态：生产就绪

exploreUrl:
<js>
sort=[];
	push=(title,url,type,fp)=>sort.push({
		title: title,
		url: url,
		style: {
				layout_flexGrow: fp,
				layout_flexBasisPercent: type
			}
	});
	u="https://apiv2hans.aixdzs.com/sort"
	xx=(a,b)=>{
		return `list,{"method": "POST","body":'{"bookTypeId":"${a}","type": "${b}","pageNum": "{{page}}"}'}`;
	}
	fls = JSON.parse(java.post(u,'',{}).body());
	push("最新",'',1,1)
	for(f of fls.data.allType){
		push(f.categoryName,u+xx(f.bookTypeId,1),0.25,0.25);
	}
	push("——",'',0.25,0.25)
	push("——",'',0.25,0.25)
	push("大热",'',1,1)
	for(l of fls.data.allType){
		push(l.categoryName,u+xx(l.bookTypeId,2),0.25,0.25);
	}
	push("——",'',0.25,0.25)
	push("——",'',0.25,0.25)
	//完本:3
	JSON.stringify(sort);
</js>

<js>
s="2c6689f91ee4d4e87d798397d47310ebbe1dad79ixdzs";
for (i = 0, h = ""; i < 8; i++) {
	x="abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789";
	r = parseInt(Math.random() * (36 - 0 +1) + 0, 10);
	h += x.charAt(r);
}
a=String(Math.round(new Date()));
sha = s + h + a + h;
sha1 = java.digestHex(sha,'SHA-1');

b = baseUrl.match(/"chapterId":(\d+),"bookId":"(\d+)"/)
u=source.getKey();
url = u + "/chapter/content,";
post=`{
  "method": "POST",
  "body":'{"chapterId": ${b[1]},"bookId":"${b[2]}"}',
  "headers":{"checkSumDTO":'{"appid":"ixdzs","checksum":"${sha1}","curtime":"${a}","nonce":"${h}"}'}
}`

result = java.ajax(url+post);
</js>$.data.chapter.chapterContent

exploreUrl:
<js>
eval(String(source.loginUrl));
var exploreUrl = [];
Account = (cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1")) && String(cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1"))).length > 0) ? cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1")) : '';
Url1 = `{{get('url1','0')}}`;
Url2 = `{{get('url2','0')}}`;
Url3 = `{{get('url3','0')}}`;
Url4 = `{{get('url4','0')}}`;
Url5 = `{{get('url5','0')}}`;
Url6 = `{{get('url6','0')}}`;
Cs = `{{get('cs','0')}}`;
Sort = `{{java.encodeURI(get('sort',Get('p')))}}`;
Sort_1 = `{{get('sort_1',Get('p'))}}`;
if(String(Account).length > 0) {
    java.ajax(Get('url') + '/account/login');
    ck = cookie.getCookie(Get('url'));
    if (!ck.includes('user=deleted') && ck.includes('user=') && Account) {
        login(Put(JSON.stringify('【登录提示】\n\n┏┅━┅━┅━┅━┅┅━┅━┅━┅━┅┓\n┋┋' + '\n账号：' + Account + '\n┋┋' + '\n❤️登录成功❤️\n┋┋' + '\n┗┅━┅━┅━┅━┅┅━┅━┅━┅━┅┛')));
    } else {
        Login();
    }
    if(cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1")) && String(cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1"))).length > 0) {
        Fav1 = cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Fav_1"));
        Fav2 = cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Fav_2"));
        exploreUrl.push(explore('✣【' + Account + '】✣', '', 1, 1, false));
        exploreUrl.push(explore('我的收藏', `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}${Url2}${Fav1}${Url3}{{page}}&filter_map={{filter_map('M')}}${Sort_1}${Url4}${Fav1}?sort=${Sort}`, 1, 0.25, false));
        exploreUrl.push(explore('我的借阅', `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}${Url6}${Fav2}&page_elements=%5B%22lending%22%5D${Url3}{{page}}&sort=week%3Adesc${Url4}${Fav2}%2Floans%23on-loan`, 1, 0.25, false));
        exploreUrl.push(explore('我的合集', `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}account_details&page_target=${Fav2}&page_elements=${Cs}${Url3}{{page}}&filter_map={{filter_map('MH')}}${Sort_1}${Url4}${Fav2}%2Fcollections?sort=${Sort}`, 1, 0.25, false));
}
    MY = Get('my');
    for (i in MY) {
        let title = MY[i].split("::")[0];
        let link = MY[i].split("::")[1];
        let target = String(link).replace(/.*\//, '');
        exploreUrl.push(explore(title, `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}${Url2}${target}${Url3}{{page}}&filter_map={{filter_map('M')}}${Sort_1}${Url5}${link}?sort=${Sort}`, 1, 1, false));
    }
}
exploreUrl.push(explore('  ༺ˇ»`ʚ  　　  ✨书籍✨   　　 ɞ´«ˇ༻', '', 1, 1, false));
exploreUrl.push(explore('全部文本', `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}${Url2}texts${Url3}{{page}}&filter_map={{filter_map('b')}}${Sort_1}${Url4}texts?sort=${Sort}`, 1, 0.45, false));
exploreUrl.push(explore('全部书籍', `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}${Url2}books${Url3}{{page}}&filter_map={{filter_map('b')}}${Sort_1}${Url4}books?sort=${Sort}`, 1, 0.45, false));
TEXT = Get('text');
for (i in TEXT) {
    let title = TEXT[i].split("::")[0];
    let link = TEXT[i].split("::")[1];
    let target = String(link).replace(/.*\//, '');
    exploreUrl.push(explore(title, `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}${Url2}${target}${Url3}{{page}}&filter_map={{filter_map('b')}}${Sort_1}${Url5}${link}?sort=${Sort}`, 1, 1, false));
}
exploreUrl.push(explore('  ༺ˇ»`ʚ  　　  ✨视频✨   　　 ɞ´«ˇ༻', '', 1, 1, false));
    exploreUrl.push(explore('全部视频', `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}${Url2}movies${Url3}{{page}}&filter_map={{filter_map('v')}}${Sort_1}${Url4}movies?sort=${Sort}`, 1, 0.45, false));
VIDEO = Get('video');
for (i in VIDEO) {
    let title = VIDEO[i].split("::")[0];
    let link = VIDEO[i].split("::")[1];
    let target = String(link).replace(/.*\//, '');
    exploreUrl.push(explore(title, `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}${Url2}${target}${Url3}{{page}}&filter_map={{filter_map('v')}}${Sort_1}${Url5}${link}?sort=${Sort}`, 1, 1, false));
}
exploreUrl.push(explore('  ༺ˇ»`ʚ  　　  ✨音频✨   　　 ɞ´«ˇ༻', '', 1, 1, false));
    exploreUrl.push(explore('全部音频', `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}${Url2}audio${Url3}{{page}}&filter_map={{filter_map('a')}}${Sort_1}${Url4}audio?sort=${Sort}`, 1, 0.45, false));
    exploreUrl.push(explore('全部音乐', `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}${Url2}etree${Url3}{{page}}&filter_map={{filter_map('a')}}${Sort_1}${Url4}etree?sort=${Sort}`, 1, 0.45, false));
AUDIO = Get('audio');
for (i in AUDIO) {
    let title = AUDIO[i].split("::")[0];
    let link = AUDIO[i].split("::")[1];
    let target = String(link).replace(/.*\//, '');
    exploreUrl.push(explore(title, `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}${Url2}${target}${Url3}{{page}}&filter_map={{filter_map('a')}}${Sort_1}${Url5}${link}?sort=${Sort}`, 1, 1, false));
}
exploreUrl.push(explore('  ༺ˇ»`ʚ  　　  ✨图像✨   　　 ɞ´«ˇ༻', '', 1, 1, false));
    exploreUrl.push(explore('全部图像', `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}${Url2}image${Url3}{{page}}&filter_map={{filter_map('i')}}${Sort_1}${Url4}image?sort=${Sort}`, 1, 0.45, false));
IMAGE = Get('image');
for (i in IMAGE) {
    let title = IMAGE[i].split("::")[0];
    let link = IMAGE[i].split("::")[1];
    let target = String(link).replace(/.*\//, '');
    exploreUrl.push(explore(title, `{{Get('url')}}${Url1}${Url2}${target}${Url3}{{page}}&filter_map={{filter_map('i')}}${Sort_1}${Url5}${link}?sort=${Sort}`, 1, 1, false));
}
JSON.stringify(exploreUrl);
</js>
header:
<js>
var Proxy = Map('代理：').split(",");
headers={
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/123.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36",
    "proxy": Proxy.some(value => parseInt(value, 10) == parseInt(Get('ci0'), 10)) ? '' : Proxy[0],

bookSourceComment:
❗️特别标注：本源只支持洛雅橙改版阅读Σ最新测试版https://github.com/Luoyacheng/legado

搜索分类
@用户
%视频
#专栏
&直播
*番剧
？影视

API来源
https://github.com/SocialSisterYi/bilibili-API-collect

url scheme链接来源
AI和网页

⚙️部分功能说明【自己随便点点点看看吧】
登录使用效果更佳

1、详情页界面 
点击书名显示【最新评论】
长按书名显示【热门评论】

点击UP主名字显示 【视频列表/专栏文集】【根据登录页设置来】
长按UP主名字显示 【视频合集/专栏动态】【根据登录页设置来】

点击 查看全部动态【查看动态】
长按 查看全部动态【搜索该up主动态】

点击右上角◎ 打开哔哩哔哩客户端
点击分享按钮，复制分享详情
点击拷贝书籍详情URL  复制网页链接
点击登录 可选择【关注up到b站 [需登录账号]】

2、视频页
点击右上角◎ 打开推荐视频 【影视无效，直播无效】
点击登录 可点赞投币收藏

3、发现页
长按书源选项后打开登录页面，可筛选分类

4、正文页
视频/文章图可点击跳转
🔗📖🎥👤图标可点击跳转
exploreUrl:
<js>
try{
let all = [];
let 展开符 = "↓ ";
let 收起符 = "↑ ";
let 占位符 = "※"
let 启用占位 = true   //是：true,否：false
//一行个数
let numy = 3;

let d = {
    1: 1,
    2: 0.4,
    3: 0.25,
    4: 0.2,
    5: 0.15,
    7: 0.1,
    10: 0.05
};

let num = d[numy];
let push = (title, url, num, g,action) =>{
	let j = {
    title: title,
    url: url,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: g == 0 ? g : 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: num
    }
  }
     if(action){
         j.action = action.action;
         j.name = action.name;
         j.type = action.type;
         j.chars = action.chars;
         j.viewName = action.viewName;
         j.default = action.default;      
     }     
     all.push(j)	
} 

function zwf(len,numy,num){
	if(len%numy!==0){
        let n = len % numy;
        let p = numy-n;
      
        for(let i=0;i<p;i++){
            push(占位符, ``, num, 1,{"type":"button","action":"java.toast('这是占位符')"});
        }
    }
}
let navdata = java.ajax("https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/nav")
let mid = JSON.parse(navdata)?.data?.mid || "";
push("搜索类型", "", 1,1,{
        "type": "select",
        "action":"show(infoMap['搜索类型'],'searchselect')",
        "chars":["🏷综合","👤用户","🎥视频","📖专栏","🎞影视","📽番剧","📺直播"],
        "default": Map("searchselect")||"综合"
    });
    push("搜索关键词", "",d["2"],1,{
        "type": "text",
        "viewName":"'搜索关键词： '+Map('searchk')",
        "action":"show(infoMap['搜索关键词'],'searchk')",
        "default":Map("searchk")
    });
    push("🔍搜索", "", d["5"],1,{
    	    "action":"toSearch()",   
        "type": "button"       
    });
push("👤我的", "", 1);
push("推送视频", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/index/top/feed/rcmd", num);
push("热门视频", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/popular?pn={\{page}}", num);
push("入站必刷", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/popular/precious", num);

if (mid) {
    push("正在直播", "https://api.live.bilibili.com/xlive/web-ucenter/v1/xfetter/GetWebList?hit_ab=true", num);

    push("专栏动态", `https://api.bilibili.com/x/polymer/web-dynamic/v1/feed/all?timezone_offset=-480&type=article&platform=web&offset={\{if(page==1){source.put("nextoffset","")};source.get("nextoffset")}}&page={\{page}}`, num);
    push("视频动态", `https://api.bilibili.com/x/polymer/web-dynamic/v1/feed/all?timezone_offset=-480&type=video&platform=web&offset={\{if(page==1){source.put("dnextoffset","")};source.get("dnextoffset")}}&page={\{page}}`, num);
    push("历史记录", `https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/history/cursor?max={\{if(page==1){source.put("nextoffset","")};source.get("nextoffset")}}`, num);
    if(启用占位){
    push(占位符, ``, num, 1,{"type":"button","action":"java.toast('这是占位符')"});
    push(占位符, ``, num, 1,{"type":"button","action":"java.toast('这是占位符')"});
    }
push("⚙️关注分组", "", 1,1,{
        "action":"show(infoMap['⚙️关注分组'],'follows')",        
        "type": "toggle",
        "chars": [展开符, 收起符],
        "default": Map("follows")||展开符
});

if(isShow('follows',展开符)){
        push("全部", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/relation/followings?vmid="+mid+"&pn={\{page}}",num);
        关注分组url = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/relation/tags";
        关注分组data = JSON.parse(java.ajax(关注分组url));
        (关注分组data?.data ?? []).forEach(x => {
            push(x.name, `https://api.bilibili.com/x/relation/tag?pn={{page}\}&tagid=${x.tagid}`, num)
        })
        
        启用占位?zwf((关注分组data?.data ?? []).length+1,numy,num):null
    }

push("🗂收藏夹", "", 1,1,{
        "action":"show(infoMap['🗂收藏夹'],'favse')",        
        "type": "toggle",
        "chars": [展开符, 收起符],
        "default": Map("favse")||展开符
});
if(isShow('favse',展开符)){
        收藏夹url = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/v3/fav/folder/created/list-all?up_mid=" + mid;
        收藏夹data = JSON.parse(java.ajax(收藏夹url));
        (收藏夹data?.data?.list ?? []).forEach(x => {
            push(x.title, `https://api.bilibili.com/x/v3/fav/resource/list?media_id=${x.id}&ps=20&pn={\{page}}`, num)
        })
        
        启用占位?zwf((收藏夹data?.data?.list ?? []).length,numy,num):null
    }
}
let 分区 = ["动画::1005", "游戏::1008", "鬼畜::1007", "音乐::1003", "舞蹈::1004", "影视::1001", "娱乐::1002", "知识::1010", "科技数码::1012", "资讯::1009", "美食::1020", "小剧场::1021", "汽车::1013", "时尚美妆::1014", "体育运动::1018", "动物::1024", "vlog::1029", "绘画::1006", "人工智能::1011", "家装房产::1015", "户外潮流::1016", "健身::1017", "手工::1019", "旅游出行::1022", "三农::1023", "亲子::1025", "健康::1026", "情感::1027", "生活兴趣::1030", "生活经验::1031", "神秘学::1028"];

push("📽视频分区", "", 1,1,{
        "action":"show(infoMap['📽视频分区'],'videofq')",        
        "type": "toggle",
        "chars": [展开符, 收起符],
        "default": Map("videofq")||展开符
});

if(isShow('videofq',展开符)){
分区.forEach(x => {
    let a = x.split("::");
    let json = `{display_id:page,request_cnt:20,from_region:${a[1]},device:"web",web_location:333.40138}`
    push(a[0], `https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/region/feed/rcmd?{\{getWbiEnc(${json})}}`, num)
});
启用占位?zwf(分区.length,numy,num):null
}

function getUrl(st = -1, sv = -1, area = -1, is_finish = -1, cr = -1, ss = -1, year = -1, rd = -1, sid = -1, pid = -1, order = -1) {
    return `https://api.bilibili.com/pgc/season/index/result?season_type=${st}&type=1&page={\{page}}&pagesize=50&season_version=${sv}&area=${area}&is_finish=${is_finish}&copyright=${cr}&season_status=${ss}&year=${java.encodeURI(year)}&release_date=${java.encodeURI(rd)}&style_id=${sid}&producer_id=${pid}&order=${order}`
}

push("视频类型","","1",1,{      
        "type": "select",
        "chars": [ "🎬番剧","🎥电影","🎞纪录片","🇨🇳国创","📺电视剧","🍿综艺"],
        "default": Map("videolx")||"🎬番剧",
        "action":"show(infoMap['视频类型'],'videolx')"
 });
 
 push("🔁排序","",d["2"],1,{
            "type": "select",        
            "chars": ["更新时间", "弹幕数量", "播放数量","追剧人数","最高评分","开播时间","上映时间"],
            "default": Map("order")||"追剧人数",
            "action":"show(infoMap['🔁排序'],'order')",
});
push("💰付费","",d["2"],1,{        	   
            "type": "select",       
            "chars": ["全部", "免费","付费", "大会员"],
            "default": Map("pay")||"全部",
            "action":"show(infoMap['💰付费'],'pay')"
})
        
function createFilterFromData(typeKey, namePrefix, fenleiData, f, icon) {
    const dataArray = [];
    (fenleiData[f] ?? []).forEach(x => {
        dataArray.push(x.n);
    });
    if (dataArray.length) {
        push(icon + namePrefix,"",d["2"],1,{
            "type": "select",
            "chars": dataArray,
            "default": Map(icon + namePrefix) || "全部",
            "action":`show(infoMap['${icon + namePrefix}'],'${icon + namePrefix}')`
        });
    }
}

    let videolx = String(Map("videolx"))?String(Map("videolx")):"🎬番剧";
    let icon = videolx.match(/^([^\u4e00-\u9fa5]+)/)[1];
    let f = videolx.match(/([\u4e00-\u9fa5]+)$/)[1];
    
    createFilterFromData("出品", "出品", fenlei["出品"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("状态", "状态", fenlei["状态"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("版权", "版权", fenlei["版权"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("类别", "类别", fenlei["类别"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("地区", "地区", fenlei["地区"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("年份", "年份", fenlei["年份"], f, icon);
    
    let ss = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "付费", String(Map('pay')));
    let order = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "排序", String(Map('order')), null);
    let area = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "地区", String(Map(icon + "地区")));
    let sv = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "类别", String(Map(icon + "类别")));
    let is_finish = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "状态", String(Map(icon + "状态")));
    let cr = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "版权", String(Map(icon + "版权")));
    let year = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "年份", String(Map(icon + "年份")));
    let pid = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "出品", String(Map(icon + "出品")));
    let rd = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "年份", String(Map(icon + "年份")));
    
    let st = fenlei["类型v"][fenlei["类型"].indexOf(f)];
    fenlei["风格"][f].forEach(y => {
        let url = getUrl(st, sv, area, is_finish, cr, ss, year, rd, y.v, pid, order);
        push(y.n, url, num)
    });
    启用占位?zwf(fenlei["风格"][f].length,numy,num):null
    
    result = JSON.stringify(all)
    
}catch(e){
	java.log(e)
	java.longToast("本书源只支持最新版洛雅橙改版阅读Σ\n请安装后重新导入书源");	java.startBrowser("https://loyc.xyz/c/legado.html#download", "下载阅读Σ最新测试版");
	
	result = `下载阅读Σ::{\{java.longToast("本书源只支持最新版洛雅橙改版阅读Σ\\n请安装后重新导入书源");java.startBrowser("https://loyc.xyz/c/legado.html#download","下载阅读Σ最新测试版");}}`;
	}
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let b = String(book.bookUrl);
let bmid = S("$.data.mid||$.data.list.mid||$.data.item.basic.uid||$.data.item.modules.module_author.mid||$.data.owner.mid||$.data.root.mid");

book.putVariable("mid", bmid);
cache.put("mid",bmid);

caid = String(cache.get("aid"));	cache.put("aid",S("$.result.main_section.episodes[0].aid"));

book.putVariable("id",S("$.data.item.basic.comment_id_str"));
getMode()
if (/web-interface\/view|series|season_id=/.test(b)) {
    if (/^🎧/.test(Map("模式"))) {
        book.type = 32;
    } else if (/^🎥/.test(Map("模式"))) {
        book.type = 4;
    }
} else if (/reply\/reply|article/.test(b)) {
    book.type = 8;
}

if(/acc\/info/.test(b)){
	book.type = 4;
	}


if (/web-interface\/view/.test(baseUrl)) {
    var p = JSON.parse(result).data;
    book.putVariable("mid", p.owner.mid);
    var d = [];
    var aid = p.aid;
    
    if (p.pages.length == 1) {
        cid = p.pages[0].cid;
        d.push({
            title: p.title,
            url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(aid+"&"+p.cid)},{"type":"c"}`,
            pubdate: p.pubdate,
            desc: formatTimeDynamic(p.duration)
        });
    } else if (p.pages.length > 1) {
        p.pages.forEach(item => {
            cid = item.cid;
            d.push({
                title: item.part===""?"无名":item.part,
                desc: formatTimeDynamic(item.duration),
                url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(aid+"&"+item.cid)},{"type":"c"}`,
                pubdate: item.pubdate,

            })
        })
    }
    if (p.ugc_season) {
        d.unshift({
            title: "当前视频",
            vol: 1
        });

        let s = p.ugc_season.sections;
                    if(/倒序/.test(M("合集"))){
                          s= s.reverse();
                    }
                    d.push({
                        title:"视频合集",
                        vol:1
                    });
                      
                    
        s.forEach(el=> {
            if(s.length>1){
            d.push({
                        title: "🎥 "+ el.title+"【"+el.episodes.length+"个视频】",
                        url:`data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode("🎥"+el.title)},{"type":"el"}`
                    });
               }
                    ep = el.episodes;
                    if(/倒序/.test(M("合集"))){
                          ep = ep.reverse();
                    }
               ep.forEach((x,i) => {
                     if(x.bvid === p.bvid){
                        d[0].title = d[0].title+ "  "+(i+1)+"/" +el.episodes.length+"【"+el.title+"】"+x.title
                    }
                if (x.pages.length == 1) {
                    d.push({
                        title:(i+1)+"🏷 "+ x.title+" ",
                        url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(x.aid + "&" + (x.pages[0] ? x.pages[0].cid : x.cid))},{"type":""}`,
                        pubdate: x.arc.pubdate,
                        desc: formatTimeDynamic(x.arc.duration)
                    });
                }

                if (x.pages.length > 1) {
                     d.push({
                        title: (i+1)+" 📖 "+ x.title+"【"+x.pages.length+"P】",
                        url:`data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode("🎥"+x.title)},{"type":"el"}`
                    });
                    x.pages.forEach((y,j)=> {
                        d.push({
                            title: (i+1)+"-" +(j+1)+"🏷 "+y.part,
                            url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(x.aid + "&" + y.cid)},{"type":""}`,
                            pubdate: y?.arc?.pubdate ?? x?.arc?.pubdate ??"",
                            desc: formatTimeDynamic(y?.arc.duration ?? y.duration) + " "+x.title
                        });
                    });
                }
            });
        });
    }
    result = JSON.stringify(d)
} else if (/reply\/reply/.test(baseUrl)) {
    if(JSON.parse(src)?.data?.root?.mid){
        book.putVariable("mid", JSON.parse(src)?.data?.root?.mid);
    }
} else if (/x\/article\/view/.test(baseUrl)) {
    book.putVariable("mid", S("$.data.author.mid"));
    result = JSON.stringify([{
        "title": S("$.data.title"),
        "url": getApi("article",S("$.data.id"),S("$.data.dyn_id_str"))
    }])
} else if (/acc\/info/.test(baseUrl)) {
    let name = S("$.data.name");
    let mid = S("$.data.mid");
    let d = [];
    let roomid = S("$.data.live_room.roomid");
    
    let liveStatus = S("$.data.live_room.liveStatus");
    if (liveStatus == "1") {
        liveStatus = "🔴";
        java.toast("【" + name + "】正在直播");
        java.log("【" + name + "】正在直播");
    } else if (liveStatus == "0") {
        liveStatus = "⚪️"
    }
    if (S("$.data.live_room.roundStatus") == "1") {
        liveStatus = "🟢"
    }
    let title = S("$.data.live_room.title");
    
    if (/🔴|🟢/.test(liveStatus)) {
        result = java.ajax("https://api.live.bilibili.com/xlive/web-room/v2/index/getRoomPlayInfo?room_id="+roomid+"&protocol=0,1&format=0,1,2&codec=0,1&qn=30000");
        let data = JSON.parse(result).data;
        let stream = data.playurl_info?.playurl?.stream;
        
        if(stream){
            let codec = stream[0].format[0].codec[0];
            let base_url = codec.base_url;
            let accept_qn = codec.accept_qn;
            accept_qn.forEach(code=>{
                d.push({
                    title:getVideoQuality(code),
                    vol:true
                });
               
                    codec.url_info.forEach((u,i)=>{
                         if(codec.current_qn==code){
                             let host = u.host;
                             let extra = u.extra;
                             d.push({
                                 title: (liveStatus+getVideoQuality(code)+(i+1) + "、【" + title + "】"  + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                                 url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(host+base_url+extra+"❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
                             })
                         }else{
                             d.push({
                                 title: (liveStatus+getVideoQuality(code)+(i+1) + "、【" + title + "】"  + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                                 url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(i+"&"+code+"❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
                             })
                         }
                  })
              })
             
          }else if(data.playurl_info == null){
              d.push({
                  title: (liveStatus+"直播已结束【" + title + "】"  + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                  url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode("❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
        })
          }
      }else {
        d.push({
            title: (liveStatus+"【" + title + "】" + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
            url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode("❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
        })
    }
    
   
   /*
  //  直接获取视频流
    if (/中/.test(liveStatus)) {
        let liveApi = "https://api.live.bilibili.com/room/v1/Room/playUrl?qn=30000&cid=" + roomid;
        let data = java.ajax(liveApi);
        let durl = JSON.parse(data).data.durl;
        durl.forEach((x,i) => {
        	java.log(durl.length-1-i)
            d.push({
                title: "线路" + x.order,
                vol: true
            }, {
                title: (x.order + "、【" + title + "】" + liveStatus + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(durl[durl.length-1-i].url)},{type:"live"}`
            })
        })
    } else {
        d.push({
            title: ("【" + title + "】" + liveStatus + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
            url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(roomid+"&"+mid)},{type:"live"}`
        })
    }
    */
   
    result = JSON.stringify(d)
} else if (/data:dynamic_type|opus\/detail|v1\/detail/.test(baseUrl)) {
    
    result = JSON.stringify([{
        title:String(book.name),
        url:baseUrl
    }])
}
result

 for(j in list){

		 	  v_list.push(JSON.stringify({

		   }))
		 }else{
		 	  text=list[j].text();
		   url=list[j].select('a').attr('href');
		   v_list.push(JSON.stringify({
			   name:text,href:url,volume:false
		   }))
		 }
	 }
}

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var arr = baseUrl.split('/');
var songtype = arr[3];
var songid = arr[4].split('.')[0];
/*
var data = java.ajax("http://service.5sing.kugou.com/song/getSongUrl?version=6.6.70&songid=" + songid + "&songtype=" + songtype);
data = JSON.parse(data).data
data.squrl || data.hqurl || data.lqurl;
*/
	
let params = {
  appid: 3146,
  clienttime: Math.ceil(Date.now() / 1000),
  clientver: 610850,
  dfid: "-",
  from: "com.sing.client.player",
  mid: 114514,
  songfields: "ID,SN,SK,SW,SS,ST,SI,CT,M,S,ZQ,WO,ZC,HY,YG,CK,D,RQ,DD,E,R,RC,SG,C,CS,LV,LG,SY,UID,PT,SCSR,SC,KM5",
  songid: songid,
  songtype: songtype,
  token: "",
  userfields: "ID,NN,I,YCRQ,FCRQ",
  uuid: "-"
}

let signstr = ""
let keys = Object.keys(params).sort()
for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
  signstr += `${keys[i]}=${params[keys[i]]}`
}
let signature = java.md5Encode("UqgPMZpjgRZQ7s8JAuUIP5DQdo5O5NB" + signstr + "UqgPMZpjgRZQ7s8JAuUIP5DQdo5O5NB")

let querys = []
for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
  querys.push(`${keys[i]}=${params[keys[i]]}`.replace(/\,/g, "%2c"))
}
let querystr = querys.join("&") + "&signature=" + signature
let request = java.ajax("https://5sapi.kugou.com/song/getSongUrl?" + querystr)
// java.log(request)
let data = JSON.parse(request).data
data.squrl || data.squrl_backup || data.hqurl || data.hqurl_backup || data.lqurl || data.lqurl_backup
</js>

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
key=java.get('key');
page=java.get('page');

//创建两个空数组
json=[];json2=[];

//判定json里是否有列表
if(JSON.parse(result).info.Datas){
json=JSON.parse(result).info.Datas;}

//加载单曲搜索页面并转为json
json1=JSON.parse(java.ajax('https://www.missevan.com/sound/getsearch?s='+key+'&type=3&page_size=10&p='+page));

//判定json里是否有列表
if(json1.info.Datas){
json2=json1.info.Datas
}

//剧集搜索列表与单曲搜索列表拼接
list=json.concat(json2);

result=JSON.stringify(list)
</js>
$.[*]
ruleSearch.name: $.soundstr||$.name

bookSourceComment:
只看楼主
◎编辑书籍详情页，在简介内容填上 【只看楼主】  保存，刷新书籍页（有已缓存的正文记得正文也要刷新）
◎内容只有楼主发帖，无作者名时间等
去空行
◎层与层之间有一行空行，不想要空行的话
◎就在书籍详情页的简介内容填上【去空行】
◎只看楼主跟去空行随便怎么写，写对字就行
发现规则url
贴吧名::https://tieba.baidu.com/mo/q/m?word=贴吧名（不要写吧字）&page_from_search=index&tn6=bdISP&tn4=bdKSW&tn7=bdPSB&lm=16842752&lp=6093&sub4=%E8%BF%9B%E5%90%A7&pn={{(page-1)*30}}

loginUrl:
<js>
function login(){
userInfo=source.getLoginInfoMap()
java.log(userInfo)
UNE=userInfo['手机号码/邮箱号']
PWD=userInfo['密码']
url="{{source.getKey()}}/api/passport/login,";
SU=source.getKey()
body={
  "account": String(UNE),
  "password": String(PWD),
  "mp_token": -1
}
option={
'method': 'POST',
'body': JSON.stringify(body)
}

url=url+JSON.stringify(option)
token=java.ajax(url).match(/"auth_token":"([^"]+)"/)[1]

Cookie={
	"Cookie":"auth_token="+token
	}
header = JSON.stringify(Cookie)
source.putLoginHeader(header)
}
</js>

ruleToc.nextTocUrl:
<js>
list=[];
if(/limit=500/.test(baseUrl)){
pages=java.get("page");
page=parseInt(pages/500);
url=String(java.get("url"));
if(page>6){
page=6
}else{page=page}
for(i=1;i<=page;i++){
list.push(url.replace(/offset=\d+/,'offset='+(parseInt(i)*500)))
}
}else if(/api-grain/.test(baseUrl)){
	offset = "{{$.data.offset}}";
	if(offset!="-1"){
	list = baseUrl.replace(/offset=\d+/,'offset='+offset);
}
	}
list
</js>

当前版本V33
───────
点击“书架”的右上角“菜单”->点击“添加网址”->将浏览器中复制到的书籍详情页链接或目录链接填进去，确认后书籍将直接添加到书架
──────书籍变量设置───────
用法：
将“单直跳全逆原图字动静”中任意多个字
或“[目录url]”或“[正文尾页url]单”
或“数字#第二页链接#”
或“[目录尾页url]录”
放在详情页右上角的书籍变量中，
确认后点刷新就能触发这些字段对应的功能。
范围：只控制当前书籍执行指定功能。
书籍变量格式示范：[http://m.biquku.la/0/425/]全字
─────⤵
直：不做目录识别，直接将详情页作为目录页，或以“[目录链接]”格式直接指定目录链接，目录识别错误时可这种做。
跳：允许目录自动跳转，目录标题说点击跳转时可如此做。
全：直接显示“预览正文”和查询到的所有章节，跳过章节筛选环节，单页文章和部分筛选后章节不全的小说网站可这样做。
逆：设置目录章节逆向排序。
原：设置书籍不进行净化替换，优点是加载正文快速且不会被误删内容，缺点是需要自己写“替换净化”规则并在正文中启用才能净化网站推广文本。
动：强制设置正文动态加载(正文默认会进行需要动态加载还是静态加载的判断，然后自动切换模式，若判断失误导致本应切换成动态加载却未切换时，可强制设置正文动态加载)。
静：强制设置正文静态加载(正文默认会进行需要动态加载还是静态加载的判断，然后自动切换模式，若判断失误导致本应保持静态加载却切换成动态加载而使正文加载时间变长时，可强制设置正文静态加载)。
图：设置成看图模式(默认为图文模式)，只显示图片，不显示文字。
字：设置成纯字模式(默认为图文模式)，只显示文本，不显示图片。
─────⤴
──目录有分页却无翻页按钮或书籍无目录──
单：无目录打开即正文但有尾页或下一页按钮的书籍，必须设置为单向模式，这样书源会直接将入口页作为正文第一页，并将第一页及其所有下一页共同构造生成“正文1”、“正文2”…的目录形式来阅读，搜索前缀“单^”、书籍变量“单”、添加网址“?单”。
录：有目录分页但无目录下一页按钮的书籍，可在书籍变量中直接指定复制到的最后目录页链接为目录链接并添加指令“录”，即可自动生成所有目录分页。
书籍变量：“[https://m.zuizaoxiaoshuo.com/ml/33280_13]录”
还可复制最后那个目录页链接并在其后加“?录”进行“添加网址”，从而自动生成补全所有目录分页。
示范链接：“https://m.zuizaoxiaoshuo.com/ml/33280_13/?录”
辅助生成──无目录打开即正文也无尾页和下一页按钮的书籍，需指定章节数量并用第二页链接作为参考链接生成所有分页。
书籍变量──220#https://wap.yqshuwang.com/2021n/02/14972_2.html#
效果说明──根据第二页链接“https://wap.yqshuwang.com/2021n/02/14972_2.html”生成220条章节的目录列表。
单个章节──目录仅一个章节且这个章节正文中无下一页按钮时，可复制那个章节的正文尾页链接并用指令“单”，便可将所有正文分页构造成章节列表。
书籍变量──[http://www.yulinzhanye.la/20/20733/532447_9.html]单
───────功能补充────────
在导入的书籍链接后加“?”，然后跟着“单直跳全逆原图字动静”中任意多个字或“[目录url]”或“[正文尾页url]单”或“数字#第二页链接#”或“[目录尾页url]录”，也能实现功能增强中描述的效果。
如：“https://m.30sy.com/book/wonengtingjiannidexitongyin0weichuanshu0/?跳”，会将“https://m.30sy.com/book/wonengtingjiannidexitongyin0weichuanshu0/”对应的书籍加入书架，并设置其目录动态加载。
添加指令的链接后也可跟URL参数，如“https://m.qubook.net/read.php?id=115393&txt=/TXT/%CA%F5%D0%DE%B4%F3%CE%D7.txt?1051#https://m.qubook.net/read.php?id=115393&txt=/TXT/%CA%F5%D0%DE%B4%F3%CE%D7.txt&yeshu=1#,{"webView":true}”这种写法也是可行的。

<js>
let uu = "https://tmp.xxltest.mengjunnet.com";

 function getCode(){
 	 let app_signature_md5 = "f73576612783f8ed8b68cdf73a56be94";
  	let phone = result.get("账号");
  	let time = String(Date.now());	
  	
   let hashvalue = String(java.md5Encode(encode(phone+time)));	
   let option = {
   "app_signature_md5":app_signature_md5,
   "app_version":"4.1.4",
   "channel":"6",
   "verify_type":"5", 
    "hashvalue":hashvalue,
   "username":phone,
   "timestamp":time
   	}
   header = {
   
   		"user-agent":"Android"
   		
   	}
   let body = "secret_content="+encodeURIComponent(encode(JSON.stringify(option)));
   java.log(body)
   let url = uu+ "/signup/send_verify_code";
   try{
 let resposebody = java.post(url,String(body),{"app-version":"4.1.4","user-agent":"Android"}).body();
 
 	let tip = JSON.parse(decode(resposebody)).tip;
 	
 	java.toast(tip)
 	}catch(e){
 		java.log(e)
 		}
 	
 	}
 
 
 	
 function login(){
 	try{
 	let login_name=source.getLoginInfoMap().get("账号")
let code=source.getLoginInfoMap().get("验证码");
    let jsonStr = {
    	"app_signature_md5":"f73576612783f8ed8b68cdf73a56be94",
    	"app_version":"4.1.4",
    	"channel":"default",
    	"uuid":"android",
    	"ver_code":code,
    	"username":login_name
    	}
    
    
    let body = "secret_content=" + encode(JSON.stringify(jsonStr));
    let option = {
        "method": "POST",
        "body": String(body)
    };
    
    let url = uu+"/signup/verify_login," + JSON.stringify(option);
    
   let respbody = decode(java.ajax(url));
//  java.log(respbody);
   let resp = JSON.parse(respbody);
   java.toast(resp.tip);
   java.log(resp.tip);
   
   
    if (resp.code == "100000") {
     body = {
     	"login_token":resp.data.login_token,
     	"account":encodeURI(resp.data.reader_info.account)
     	}
     source.putLoginHeader(JSON.stringify(body)) 
    } else {
        java.toast('❗️ ' + resp.tip + ' ❗️')
    }
    }catch(e){
    	java.log(e)
    	}
}
</js>

<js>
sckey = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(java.ajax(source.key + "search")).select(".page-search").attr("data-id");
java.log(sckey);
body = {
  "body": `name=${key}&tags=&type=3&tt=&page_index=${page}&app=2&searchkey=${sckey}`,
  "headers":{"Referer":source.key},
  "method": "POST"
}
result = source.key + "api/search/list" + "," + JSON.stringify(body);
result;
</js>

}
cache.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "headers"),JSON.stringify(headers));
JSON.stringify(headers);
</js>

ruleContent.title:
<js>
if (Get('s') > 0) {
    var ComicId = cache.get(java.md5Encode16('ComicId' + book.bookUrl));
    var Epid = String(baseUrl).replace(/.*ep_id\"\:(\d+)\}.*/, '$1');
    var purl = 'https://www.biliplus.com/manga/?act=read&mangaid=' + ComicId + '&epid=' + Epid;
    var html = java.ajax(purl);
    if (/〔/.test(chapter.title)) {
        var title = chapter.title.match(/(.*)(〔.*)/);
        var Rtitle = title[1] + (html.includes('comic-single') ? '📡' : '') + title[2];
    } else {
        var Rtitle = chapter.title + (html.includes('comic-single') ? '📡' : '');
    }
    String(Rtitle).replace(/[📡]+/g, '📡');
}
</js>
